name: calr_profile_query
description: CalR-compatible indirect calorimetry dataset queried against a gene-labeled calorimetry reference library to produce weighted gene programs and GMT gene sets

inputs.name: calr_data_csv
inputs.description: Standardized CalR data CSV with subject-level time series

inputs.name: session_csv
inputs.description: Preferred CalR session CSV carrying selected window, group, and body-composition metadata

inputs.name: reference_profiles_tsv
inputs.description: Reference calorimetry feature profiles when not using a bundle

inputs.name: reference_metadata_tsv
inputs.description: Reference perturbation metadata keyed by reference id

inputs.name: feature_schema_tsv
inputs.description: Optional explicit feature schema for alignment

inputs.name: feature_stats_tsv
inputs.description: Optional feature center/scale table for standardization

parameters.name: dataset_label
parameters.help: Optional dataset label for summaries and GMT naming

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Optional signature label for summaries and GMT naming

parameters.name: analysis_start_hour
parameters.help: Explicit selected-window start hour; overrides session values

parameters.name: analysis_end_hour
parameters.help: Explicit selected-window end hour; overrides session values

parameters.name: photoperiod_lights_on_hour
parameters.help: Explicit lights-on hour; overrides session values

parameters.name: photoperiod_hours_light
parameters.help: Hours classified as light phase

parameters.name: exploratory_without_session
parameters.help: Allow exploratory analysis without a session CSV, with strong warnings

parameters.name: mass_covariate
parameters.help: Explicit mass/body-composition covariate; otherwise Lean.Mass then Total.Mass then subject.mass

parameters.name: min_group_size
parameters.help: Minimum per-group sample size before falling back to simpler contrasts

parameters.name: resources_manifest
parameters.help: Optional resource manifest override

parameters.name: resources_dir
parameters.help: Optional local resources directory containing calorimetry bundle files

parameters.name: resource_policy
parameters.help: Behavior when requested bundle files are missing

parameters.name: reference_bundle_id
parameters.help: Optional calorimetry reference bundle id supplying reference profiles/metadata/schema/stats

parameters.name: output_gene_species
parameters.help: Emit humanized gene outputs by default for mouse calorimetry references

parameters.name: ortholog_policy
parameters.help: Mouse-to-human ortholog mapping policy when output_gene_species=human

parameters.name: mouse_human_orthologs_tsv
parameters.help: Optional explicit mouse-human ortholog table; otherwise use packaged defaults or bundle content

parameters.name: similarity_metric
parameters.help: Similarity metric between query and reference profiles

parameters.name: similarity_floor
parameters.help: Ignore references below this similarity threshold

parameters.name: similarity_power
parameters.help: Exponent on positive similarities before evidence weighting

parameters.name: hubness_penalty
parameters.help: Penalty applied to hub-like reference profiles

parameters.name: provenance_mismatch_penalty
parameters.help: Penalty factor applied for query/reference provenance mismatches

parameters.name: select
parameters.help: Gene selection method on routed profile-query scores

parameters.name: top_k
parameters.help: K for select=top_k

parameters.name: quantile
parameters.help: Fraction for select=quantile

parameters.name: min_score
parameters.help: Threshold for select=threshold

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.help: Selected-gene weight normalization

parameters.name: emit_full
parameters.help: Write geneset.full.tsv for each emitted program

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write per-program and combined GMT files

parameters.name: gmt_format
parameters.help: GMT serialization format

parameters.name: gmt_topk_list
parameters.help: Comma-separated top-K GMT plans

parameters.name: gmt_min_genes
parameters.help: Minimum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: gmt_max_genes
parameters.help: Maximum genes per GMT set

parameters.name: emit_small_gene_sets
parameters.help: Emit sets below gmt_min_genes with warning

outputs.name: manifest.tsv
outputs.description: Grouped program manifest across contrasts and calorimetry programs

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.meta.json
outputs.description: Metadata and provenance for one profile-query program
